narrative:
Sycamore A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 131 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 51.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 48.9 percentage points.
